FR-01.title: Hotel Search and Filters
requirements: Search by destination, check-in/out dates, and guests
Filter by price range, star rating, amenities
Sort by price, rating, distance from center
Map view showing hotel locations
acceptance_criteria: Map pins correspond to listed hotels

FR-02.title: Room Reservation
requirements: View room types with photos, amenities, and prices
Select room and complete booking
System checks room availability in real-time
Booking confirmation sent via email

FR-03.title: Guest Profile and Preferences
requirements: Store guest preferences for room type and amenities
Save frequent guest details for faster booking
Loyalty points system for repeat customers
View booking history
acceptance_criteria: Preferences are saved and applied to searches

FR-04.title: Payment and Invoice
requirements: Pay via credit card, PayPal, or bank transfer
Partial payment with deposit option
Generate detailed invoice with tax breakdown
Automated refund on cancellation within policy

FR-05.title: Booking Cancellation and Modification
requirements: Cancel booking per cancellation policy
Modify dates or room type if available
Free cancellation up to 48 hours before check-in
Cancellation fees apply within 48 hours

FR-06.title: Hotel Owner Property Management
requirements: Add property with details, photos, and room types
Set pricing per room type with seasonal rates
Manage room inventory and availability calendar
View booking reports and revenue

FR-07.title: Guest Review System
requirements: Guests can rate hotel after checkout
Rate cleanliness, service, location, value separately
Write text review with optional photos
Hotel can respond to reviews
acceptance_criteria: Rating is only allowed after checkout

FR-08.title: Check-in and Check-out
requirements: Online check-in available 24 hours before arrival
Generate digital room key via app
Express check-out with email receipt
Late check-out request option

FR-01.title: Build Hotel Search API
FR-01.description: Create GET /api/hotels/search with params: destination, check_in, check_out, guests, min_price, max_price, stars, amenities, sort_by. Return paginated results with availability check. Geo-search for map view.

FR-01.title: Build Search Interface
FR-01.description: Create search page with destination autocomplete, date range picker, guest counter, and search button. Results page with hotel cards and filter sidebar. Map view toggle with pins.

FR-01.title: Create Hotel Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design hotels table: id, name, description, address, city, lat, lng, stars, amenities (JSON), images. rooms table: hotel_id, type, price, capacity, count. Add geo index on lat/lng.

FR-02.title: Build Reservation API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/reservations (hotel_id, room_type, check_in, check_out, guests). Verify availability using concurrent-safe locking. Block dates. Send confirmation email. Return reservation details.

FR-02.title: Build Room Selection and Booking UI
FR-02.description: Create room listing for selected hotel with room photos, amenities icons, price per night, and total. Book Now flow with guest details form, payment, and confirmation page.

FR-03.title: Build Guest Profile API
FR-03.description: Create GET/PATCH /api/profile/preferences (room type, amenities, bed type). GET /api/profile/loyalty (points balance, tier). GET /api/profile/bookings (history). Points awarded per booking.

FR-03.title: Build Profile and Loyalty Screen
FR-03.description: Create profile page with saved preferences form, loyalty tier badge with progress bar, points balance, and booking history list with status badges.

FR-04.title: Build Payment API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/payments (full or deposit). Integrate payment gateway. Generate PDF invoice with tax breakdown. POST /api/payments/:id/refund (process refund per policy). Handle currency conversion.

FR-04.title: Build Payment and Invoice UI
FR-04.description: Create payment flow with method selection, amount summary (room + tax + fees), and processing screen. Invoice viewer with download button. Payment history in profile.

FR-05.title: Build Cancellation and Modification API
FR-05.description: Create DELETE /api/reservations/:id (cancel with policy enforcement: free if >48h, fee otherwise). PATCH /api/reservations/:id (modify dates/room with availability check and price adjustment).

FR-05.title: Build Manage Booking UI
FR-05.description: Create booking management page with cancel and modify buttons. Cancellation shows policy terms and fee preview before confirming. Modification shows new availability and price difference.

FR-06.title: Build Property Management API
FR-06.description: Create owner endpoints: POST /api/owner/properties (add hotel), PATCH /api/owner/properties/:id (update), POST /api/owner/rooms (add room type), PATCH /api/owner/pricing (set rates with date ranges).

FR-06.title: Build Owner Dashboard
FR-06.description: Create property management dashboard with property editor, room inventory grid, pricing calendar with drag-to-set rates, availability calendar, and booking/revenue charts.

FR-07.title: Build Review API
FR-07.description: Create POST /api/hotels/:id/reviews (after checkout only). Accept overall and category ratings (cleanliness, service, location, value), text, photos. Hotel owners: POST /api/reviews/:id/response.

FR-07.title: Build Review Section UI
FR-07.description: Create review section with category rating bars, individual review cards with photos, and review form (star selectors per category, text, photo upload). Hotel response displayed below review.

FR-08.title: Build Digital Check-in API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/reservations/:id/checkin (available 24h before). Generate digital key token. POST /api/reservations/:id/checkout (express, generate receipt). PATCH for late checkout request.

FR-08.title: Build Check-in/out Screens
FR-08.description: Create online check-in form (verify details, submit). Digital key screen with QR code for room access. Express checkout button with email receipt confirmation. Late checkout request form.
